feedItems.description: allocated £6.0m to Environment & Streets (≈£57 per resident)
allocated £2.6m to Culture & Leisure (≈£25 per resident)
allocated £4.8m to Council Running Costs (≈£46 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £103 (4.9%) to £2213
